chk_conv_scope_exactly_one.name: chk_conv_scope_exactly_one
chk_conv_scope_exactly_one.value:
(CASE WHEN "chat_conversation"."flashcard_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   CASE WHEN "chat_conversation"."question_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   CASE WHEN "chat_conversation"."session_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   CASE WHEN "chat_conversation"."material_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1

idx_dep_cc.name: idx_dep_cc
idx_dep_cc.where: "learning_dependency"."course_item_id" IS NOT NULL AND "learning_dependency"."depends_on_course_id" IS NOT NULL

idx_dep_cm.name: idx_dep_cm
idx_dep_cm.where: "learning_dependency"."course_item_id" IS NOT NULL AND "learning_dependency"."depends_on_material_id" IS NOT NULL

idx_dep_mc.name: idx_dep_mc
idx_dep_mc.where: "learning_dependency"."material_item_id" IS NOT NULL AND "learning_dependency"."depends_on_course_id" IS NOT NULL

idx_dep_mm.name: idx_dep_mm
idx_dep_mm.where: "learning_dependency"."material_item_id" IS NOT NULL AND "learning_dependency"."depends_on_material_id" IS NOT NULL

chk_dep_item_xor.name: chk_dep_item_xor
chk_dep_item_xor.value: (course_item_id IS NOT NULL AND material_item_id IS NULL) OR (course_item_id IS NULL AND material_item_id IS NOT NULL)

chk_dep_target_xor.name: chk_dep_target_xor
chk_dep_target_xor.value: (depends_on_course_id IS NOT NULL AND depends_on_material_id IS NULL) OR (depends_on_course_id IS NULL AND depends_on_material_id IS NOT NULL)
